content.en:
"I've seen Xuanhuang Daozu!"

Ye Tian saw Xuanhuang Daozu and said respectfully.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, I am on the order of the Pavilion Master to give you this thing!" Xuan Huangdao took out a bead.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Xuanhuang Daozu introduced: "This is the Hanhai Pearl, which is the certificate to enter the No. 3 Ancient Nest. There is no danger in the No. 3 Ancient Nest, and it is the only Ancient Nest in the Hanhai District that is controlled by many top forces such as the Hanhai Palace. The reason why there is no danger is that the No. 3 Ancient Nest does not restrict the entry of the Yae Ancestor. A long time ago, a number of Yae Primordial Ancestors entered the No. 3 Ancient Nest, killed all the powerful Primordial Antiquities, and used the power of the Great Shore to transform the No. 3 Ancient Nest. Now, even if the No. 3 Ancient Nest gave birth to a Sevenfold Ancestor, it would be hunted down immediately. Therefore, the Primordial Antiquities inside the No. 3 Ancient Nest were all weak, and the strongest Primordial Antiquities were comparable to the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor. "

"Xuanhuang Daozu, what is the chance of the No. 3 Ancient Nest?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"There are a lot of resources in the No. 3 Ancient Nest, but most of the resources have been taken away by the major forces, and it is impossible for you to give them to you, for you, the most precious opportunity for the No. 3 Ancient Nest is the Ancient River of Life. "

Xuanhuang Daozu mentioned the Ancient River of Life, and said with some awe: "It is said that the Ancient River of Life is also a primordial antiquity, but it is a special primordial ancient artifact that cannot move or attack. Of course, if you want to remove the ancient river of life, there will be a great catastrophe. For you half-step sevenfold ancestors, the Ancient River of Life can raise the level of life!"

"Raise the !! of life"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

He knew that every life had a life level, and when he was still weak, he had raised his life level many times, and this was how he compared to those powerful life forms.

Whether it is the boundary of the Hanhai region or other boundaries, life has been born from the beginning, and there is a big gap in the level of life.

But with the cultivation, the level of life is getting higher and higher, and when it comes to the level of Dao Ancestor, the gap is not big.

At this time, if you want to improve your life level, you can only rely on breaking through the realm, and if you want to rely on treasures to improve your life level, it is incredibly difficult.

"I've reached the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor realm, can my life level still be improved?" Ye Tian said in surprise.

"Yes!"

Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor affirmed: "The half-step sevenfold origin ancestor is also different from the half-step sevenfold origin ancestor, even if you have comprehended the ninefold yuan dao, at the same level, some of the gaps are very large. As for the Hanhai Realm, the only place that can raise the half-step sevenfold life level is the Life Ancient River! I heard that in other regions, there are other treasures that can raise the life level of the half-step sevenfold ancestor, and even the life level of the seven-fold ancestor and the eightfold ancestor. "

"Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor, when it comes to our level, how to divide the life level, I don't seem to have heard of the division of the life level of the Dao Ancestor before. Ye Tian was curious to ask.

Xuanhuang Daozu introduced: "It's normal for you not to know, in fact, ordinary Dao Ancestors don't care about the division of life levels, after all, it doesn't help to break through the realm, it's just to improve combat effectiveness, and they can't improve, so naturally they don't want to know the specific division." Strictly speaking, the life level of an ordinary Sixfold Dao Ancestor is 1, the life level of a half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor who has comprehended the Sevenfold Yuan Path is 2, the life level of a top-level Half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor is 3, and the life level of an ordinary Sevenfold Ancestor is at the lowest of 5. For example, my life level has reached 7.8, which is considered a generalization among the Dao Ancestors at the peak of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor. You have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and you have broken the boundary more than seventy times, and the life level is at the lowest of 4 according to my guess, but I can't be sure how much you have reached. "

"Life levels are so divided!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

At this time, Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor said again: "Endless Dao Ancestor, even if you can't break through the eighty-one boundary, it is best to be able to break through to the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor with 5 life levels in the future, so that your strength will be greatly improved." And as soon as you break through, your life level will break through to 7, and when your Yuan Dao realm rises sharply and you break through to the peak of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, your life level may step into the ranks of 9!"

"I must!"

Ye Tianying said.

At this moment, he even felt that his life level had stepped above 5.

After all, his Endless Yuan Dao had already reached the Dacheng realm, and he had broken through the boundary of eighty times, and he had so many Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowments.

It can be said that the foundation of his potential has reached an incredible level, and it is normal for his life level to reach above 5.

After Ye Tian subordinated Han Haizhu, Xuanhuang Daozu left.

Before leaving, Xuanhuang Daozu told Ye Tian to go to the No. 3 Ancient Nest as soon as possible.

This time, the major forces issued a lot of Hanhai Pearls at one time, and those half-step sevenfold ancestors who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao had all obtained them, and some of the more half-step sevenfold ancestors had also obtained them.

The reason why I chose it now is because the Life Ancient River is very calm during this period of time, even if many half-step sevenfold ancestors enter the Life Ancient River and absorb the energy of the Life Ancient River, there will be no problem.

If you enter the Ancient River of Life in other periods, if the number of people is large, it may cause the ancient river of Life to fluctuate, and then there is no way to cultivate and improve the level of life.

......

The No. 3 Ancient Nest is located in the ancient city of Hanhai on the boundary of the Hanhai District, which belongs to the Hanhai Palace and is controlled by the Hanhai Palace.

However, if other Dao Ancestors come here, they will not be restricted.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Hanhai Ancient City, he had the Hanhai Pearl as a certificate, so he was not hindered in any way, and came to a gate that entered the No. 3 Ancient Nest.

Nest 3 is completely controlled by the boundaries of the Hanhai Zone, so there is a gate that connects to Nest 3, and it is very convenient to enter Nest 3.

Unlike the No. 13 Ancient Nest, the Hanhai District Boundary cannot be controlled, and the strong cannot even enter, so they can only enter it during a certain period.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian passed through the Dao Gate and directly entered the No. 3 Ancient Nest.

At this time, he came to an ancient city inside the No. 3 Ancient Nest, although it was not big, but there were many Dao Ancestors here.

Other than that.

Ye Tian noticed a lot of half-step sevenfold ancestors, and some of them were Dao ancestors who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao that he had seen.

For example, Canggu Dao Ancestor.

This time, this one also came in.

Ye Tian saw Canggu Dao Ancestor, and Canggu Dao Ancestor also saw Ye Tian.

The two looked at each other, full of hostility, but this was not the outside world after all, so they couldn't fight.

Abrupt.

A Sevenfold Dao Ancestor appeared in front of Ye Tian and said, "Endless Dao Ancestor, please follow me, I will take you to test the life level, this is a transaction between Hanhai Palace and other forces, every Dao Ancestor who wants to play the Ancient River of Life must be tested!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, he knew this, so he followed this Sevenfold Ancestor over.
